$comment: User-level Azure CLI guardrails. First-match-wins rule list. Default posture: ALLOW unmatched commands. Loaded by Gate-ShellCommands.ps1 at preToolUse time. Edit rules here; restart Copilot CLI session for changes to take effect.

rules.$comment: DENY: fire-and-forget resource group destruction — irreversible, no confirmation prompt
rules.reason: Catastrophic: fire-and-forget resource group deletion (--yes --no-wait)

rules.$comment: DENY: same pattern reversed flag order
rules.reason: Catastrophic: fire-and-forget resource group deletion (--no-wait --yes)

rules.$comment: DENY: az rest with destructive methods — bypasses verb-level rules
rules.reason: az rest with mutating method bypasses command-level guardrails

rules.$comment: ALLOW: read-only operations — list/show/get across all services
rules.reason: Read-only operation

rules.$comment: ALLOW: az account show (common status check)
rules.reason: Read-only account info

rules.$comment: ALLOW: az --version, az help, az find
rules.reason: Non-mutating informational command

rules.$comment: ALLOW: az configure (local config, not destructive)
rules.reason: Local configuration only

rules.$comment: ASK: subscription switch — changes context for all subsequent commands
rules.reason: Subscription switch changes context for all subsequent az commands
Auth state change affects all subsequent Azure operations
Resource group deletion destroys all contained resources
VM lifecycle operation affects running workloads
Storage account deletion destroys all blobs/queues/tables
Key Vault deletion affects secrets/keys/certificates
Secret mutation affects dependent services
AKS deletion destroys cluster and all workloads
SQL deletion destroys databases and data

rules.$comment: ASK: App Service / Function App delete
rules.reason: App deletion removes deployed application
RBAC changes affect security permissions across resources

rules.$comment: ASK: Azure AD app/service principal mutations
rules.reason: AD identity mutations affect authentication/authorization
DevOps project mutations affect team workflows
PR abandonment discards code review context
Pipeline run triggers deployment/build with side effects

rules.$comment: ASK: work-item update to terminal/destructive states (DEF-7: was uncovered, fell to default allow)
rules.reason: Work item state change to terminal state (Removed/Closed/Resolved) — confirm intent
Work item deletion removes project tracking data
Resource group creation sets up billing context

rules.$comment: ASK: any resource delete not caught above
rules.reason: Generic Azure resource deletion
